objective.statement: Stop Codex clients that use the CentralCloud Responses provider from advertising unsupported hosted web_search tools while preserving the separate MCP browser/search capability.
objective.measure: Every activated Codex root and role configuration disables hosted web search, a captured fresh-client request contains no tool with type web_search, and the CentralCloud MCP/web tool remains configured.

need.statement: Stop Codex clients that use the CentralCloud Responses provider from advertising unsupported hosted web_search tools while preserving the separate MCP browser/search capability.
stakeholders: Codex root sessions and subagents routed through llm-gateway.
need.baseline: The shared configuration omits web_search and the web-researcher role overrides it to live. Current Codex therefore sends a hosted web_search tool to configured Responses providers, and llm-gateway rejects subagent requests with HTTP 422 before the worker starts.
need.consequence_of_no_action: Codex subagents continue failing before execution and swarm work cannot fan out reliably.
alternatives_considered: Teach llm-gateway to pretend it supports OpenAI hosted web search
Change the model catalog web_search_tool_type field

purpose: Stop Codex clients that use the CentralCloud Responses provider from advertising unsupported hosted web_search tools while preserving the separate MCP browser/search capability.
consumer: Codex root sessions and subagents routed through llm-gateway.
contract: Every activated Codex root and role configuration disables hosted web search, a captured fresh-client request contains no tool with type web_search, and the CentralCloud MCP/web tool remains configured.
failure_boundary: Do not remove or disable the CentralCloud MCP gateway or its browser/search namespace. If the managed preference cannot be applied to the mutable live config or a fresh request still advertises hosted web_search, do not publish the change.

evidence.description: Preference tests prove web_search is applied durably without destroying unrelated mutable configuration; a fresh-client request capture proves the hosted tool is absent.

falsifier.claim: The change stops unsupported hosted web search without removing MCP search.

executable_check.description: Run preference/config tests and capture a fresh Codex request; any hosted web_search tool or missing MCP gateway falsifies the claim.

non_goals: Implement OpenAI hosted web search in llm-gateway
Remove the web.run or CentralCloud MCP capability
invariants: The mutable live Codex configuration preserves machine-local and runtime-owned fields
The CentralCloud MCP gateway remains required and configured
All subagent role overrides inherit or explicitly enforce hosted-search disabled

assumptions.statement: The installed Codex version honors the documented top-level web_search disabled setting for configured Responses providers.
assumptions.falsifier: A captured request from a fresh installed Codex process still contains a tool whose type is web_search.

plane_constraints: Home Manager and dotfiles own durable Codex configuration; llm-gateway remains unchanged in this slice.
